summary.en: Compile the current TuyaOpen project via tos.py build.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 tos.py build 编译当前 TuyaOpen 项目。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user asks to build, compile, or rebuild the active project.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户要求编译、构建或重新编译当前项目时使用。

summary.en: Read or update the tuyaopen.project.ini for the active project.
summary.zh-CN: 读取或修改当前项目的 tuyaopen.project.ini。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user wants to change platform, rename, or edit project settings.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户希望更换平台、重命名或修改项目级设置时使用。

summary.en: Register a freshly-downloaded PlatformIO library with the active TuyaOpen project's build system. Reads the pinned version from the project lockfile, then patches CMakeLists.txt and Kconfig where applicable.
summary.zh-CN: 把刚下载的 PlatformIO 库正式注册到当前 TuyaOpen 项目的构建系统里。版本号从项目锁文件读取，并在必要时同步修改 CMakeLists.txt 与 Kconfig。

whenToUse.en: Use immediately after the IDE downloads a library from the Library → Ecosystem tab.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当 IDE 通过库 → 生态标签页下载新库后立即触发。

name.zh-CN: 涂鸦 IoT 平台操作

summary.en: Create products, get PID, query and configure DPs on the Tuya Developer Platform via tuya-devplat-cli.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 tuya-devplat-cli 在涂鸦开发者平台创建产品、获取 PID、查询和配置功能点（DP）。

whenToUse.en: Use when creating a Tuya product, retrieving a PID, querying or adding DPs (data points / 功能点), binding panels, releasing products, or performing any operation on the Tuya Developer Platform (iot.tuya.com).
whenToUse.zh-CN: 创建涂鸦产品、获取 PID、查询或添加功能点（DP）、绑定面板、发布产品，以及任何需要在涂鸦开发者平台（iot.tuya.com）上操作时使用。

summary.en: End-to-end IoT product development: requirements → Tuya Platform product/DP creation → complete embedded firmware. State-machine detects project state and picks up from wherever development stands.
summary.zh-CN: 端到端 IoT 产品开发：需求梳理 → 涂鸦平台建产品/DP → 完整嵌入式固件生成。状态机检测项目进度，从当前阶段继续。

whenToUse.en: Use when developer wants to build a complete IoT product from scratch, or to continue from any mid-point in the development flow.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当开发者要从零开始做 IoT 产品，或从中途继续开发时使用。

summary.en: Flash firmware, read flash, hardware reset (DTR/RTS), and authorize devices (UUID/AuthKey via UART) using tyutool_cli directly.
summary.zh-CN: 直接使用 tyutool_cli 烧录固件、读取 Flash、硬件复位（DTR/RTS）、写入设备授权码（UUID/AuthKey）。

whenToUse.en: Use when the agent needs to flash firmware, read flash memory, hardware-reset a device, or write UUID/AuthKey credentials over UART using tyutool_cli directly.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当需要直接使用 tyutool_cli 烧录固件、读取 Flash、硬件复位设备或通过 UART 写入 UUID/AuthKey 授权码时使用。

summary.en: Non-blocking background serial log capture for TuyaOpen devices. Runs tos.py monitor -l in background, writes logs to <project_dir>/.target_logging/, lets agent tail or stop at any time.
summary.zh-CN: TuyaOpen 设备非阻塞后台串口日志捕获。后台运行 tos.py monitor -l，日志写入 <project_dir>/.target_logging/，agent 可随时读取或停止。

whenToUse.en: Use when the agent needs to capture device serial logs without blocking, monitor UART output during a build-flash-analyze loop, or read device logs asynchronously.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当 AI 代理需要在不阻塞的情况下捕获设备串口日志、在编译-烧录-分析闭环中监控 UART 输出，或异步读取设备日志时使用。

summary.en: Add a new board / BSP to TuyaOpen — directory, Kconfig, drivers, and pin map.
summary.zh-CN: 为 TuyaOpen 新增开发板 / BSP：目录、Kconfig、驱动、引脚映射。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user wants to add support for a new development board or BSP (Board Support Package) to the TuyaOpen SDK — creating directories, Kconfig entries, drivers, and pin maps.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户希望为 TuyaOpen SDK 新增开发板或 BSP（板级支持包）支持时使用，包括创建目录、Kconfig 条目、驱动及引脚映射。

summary.en: Validate C/C++ formatting, file headers (@copyright required), and forbidden Chinese characters via clang-format and check_format.py.
summary.zh-CN: 通过 clang-format 与 check_format.py 校验 C/C++ 代码格式、文件头（@copyright 必填），并禁用中文字符。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user asks to check code formatting, validate file headers, run clang-format, or verify code quality before submitting or merging.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户要求检查代码格式、校验文件头、运行 clang-format 或在提交/合并前验证代码质量时使用。

summary.en: Automated build–flash–monitor–analyze loop for TuyaOpen devices, with log analysis and error-pattern matching.
summary.zh-CN: TuyaOpen 设备的自动化编译—烧录—监控—分析闭环，含日志分析与错误码识别。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user wants a full automated build–flash–monitor cycle, log analysis, or error-pattern matching on a TuyaOpen device.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户希望执行完整的自动化编译—烧录—监控闭环、分析设备日志或匹配错误模式时使用。

summary.en: Write UUID/AuthKey/PID to TuyaOpen devices — via tuya_config.h (source code) or serial KV flash (UART shell). Obtain authorization codes from platform.tuya.com.
summary.zh-CN: 向 TuyaOpen 设备写入 UUID/AuthKey/PID，支持源码（tuya_config.h）和串口 KV flash（UART shell）两种方式。从 platform.tuya.com 获取授权码。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user mentions device authorization, UUID, AuthKey, PID configuration, network provisioning, device pairing, or cloud connection setup.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户提到设备授权、UUID、AuthKey、PID 配置、网络配网、设备配对或云连接设置时使用。

summary.en: Install dependencies and activate the TuyaOpen development environment via export.sh / export.ps1 / export.bat. Sets OPEN_SDK_ROOT and OPEN_SDK_PYTHON.
summary.zh-CN: 安装依赖并通过 export.sh / export.ps1 / export.bat 激活 TuyaOpen 开发环境，设置 OPEN_SDK_ROOT 和 OPEN_SDK_PYTHON。

whenToUse.en: Use when the user first sets up the TuyaOpen development environment, installs dependencies, or needs to activate the SDK environment. Also use when tos.py is not found or OPEN_SDK_ROOT is not set.
whenToUse.zh-CN: 当用户首次搭建 TuyaOpen 开发环境、安装依赖，或需要激活 SDK 环境时使用。当 tos.py 找不到或 OPEN_SDK_ROOT 未设置时也使用。
